title: ServiceNow Incident
description: A ServiceNow incident record used for tracking disruptions to IT services, reporting issues, and managing resolution workflows within IT Service Management.

sys_id.description: The unique 32-character system identifier for the incident record.

number.description: The human-readable incident number, prefixed with INC.

short_description.description: A brief summary of the incident used as the primary display title.

description.description: A detailed description of the incident including symptoms and impact.

state.description: The current state of the incident: 1=New, 2=In Progress, 3=On Hold, 6=Resolved, 7=Closed, 8=Canceled.

category.description: The category of the incident, such as Inquiry, Software, Hardware, or Network.

subcategory.description: The subcategory providing further classification within the category.

contact_type.description: The method through which the incident was reported, such as phone, email, or self-service.

caller_id.description: The user who reported the incident.

assigned_to.description: The user assigned to work on the incident.

assignment_group.description: The group responsible for resolving the incident.

opened_by.description: The user who created the incident record.

opened_at.description: The date and time the incident was opened.

resolved_by.description: The user who resolved the incident.

resolved_at.description: The date and time the incident was resolved.

closed_by.description: The user who closed the incident.

closed_at.description: The date and time the incident was closed.

close_code.description: The code indicating how the incident was resolved.

close_notes.description: Notes recorded at the time of resolution or closure.

cmdb_ci.description: The configuration item affected by the incident.

business_service.description: The business service impacted by the incident.

company.description: The company associated with the incident.

location.description: The location associated with the incident.

notify.description: Notification preference: 1=Do Not Notify, 2=Send Notifications, 3=Send Notifications for state changes.

work_notes.description: Internal work notes visible only to the fulfillment team.

comments.description: Additional comments visible to the caller.

reopen_count.description: The number of times the incident has been reopened.

reassignment_count.description: The number of times the incident has been reassigned.

upon_reject.description: Action to take when an approval is rejected.

upon_approval.description: Action to take when an approval is granted.

active.description: Whether the incident record is active.

knowledge.description: Whether the incident has been flagged as a knowledge candidate.

made_sla.description: Whether the incident resolution met the SLA target.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the record was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who created the record.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the record was last updated.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last updated the record.

sys_mod_count.description: The number of times the record has been modified.

sys_class_name.description: The table class name for the record.

ReferenceField.description: A ServiceNow reference field that can be a sys_id string or an object containing a link and value.

link.description: The API URL to the referenced record.

value.description: The sys_id of the referenced record.

display_value.description: The display value of the referenced record.
